title: Add badge to a custom object
excerpt: I would like to request a feature to add a badge to a custom object. This would allow a monday customer to see when there are new things to check out in the custom object. For example, if there are new messages to see or…

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to request a feature to add a badge to a custom object. This would allow a monday customer to see when there are new things to check out in the custom object. For example, if there are new messages to see or new content to view.

I would imagine that the badge count could be incremented via the API. It would also be great to add a badge count to a board view. That way customers can check out the new updates in a board view.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @PluginGenie,

I have added your request for our team

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
